title: Document automatic bead git commits
description: Update operator and developer docs to describe that bead JSON writes and deletions are committed automatically, including the intent of the commit messages and the impact on merge reliability and git history visibility.
acceptance_criteria: User-facing workflow docs mention that bead state changes are auto-committed and no longer require manual staging to avoid merge preflight failures.
Developer-facing storage documentation explains that RepositoryStorage now commits bead writes and deletions best-effort through the storage chokepoint.
Documentation reflects the commit message format at a high level without contradicting implementation behavior.
conflict_risks: None — only storage.py was modified, no overlap with other in-progress beads expected.
